description: 鼠尾草墨绿 - 深绿 + 象牙白,克制专业的自然色,适合数据分析 / 研究报告 / 长篇深度内容

styles.body: font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Helvetica Neue', 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif; font-size: 15.5px; color: #1e2a21; line-height: 1.85; letter-spacing: 0.4px; word-spacing: 1.5px; padding: 14px 0; background: #f7f5ee;
styles.h1: font-size: 23px; font-weight: 800; color: #1e2a21; text-align: left; margin: 34px 0 22px; padding: 0 0 14px 0; border-bottom: 2px solid #1e2a21; letter-spacing: 0.3px; line-height: 1.4;
styles.h2: font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; color: #1e2a21; margin: 36px 0 16px; padding: 10px 0 10px 14px; border-left: 4px solid #5c7a65; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #e8ede3 0%, transparent 80%); border-radius: 0 4px 4px 0; line-height: 1.5; letter-spacing: 0.3px;
styles.h3: font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; color: #3a4f3f; margin: 26px 0 12px; padding: 0 0 6px 0; border-bottom: 1px dashed #b8c5bb; letter-spacing: 0.3px;
styles.p: margin: 14px 0; text-indent: 0; text-align: justify; color: #1e2a21; line-height: 1.9;
styles.blockquote: margin: 24px 0; padding: 18px 22px; background: #eef1ea; border-left: 3px solid #5c7a65; color: #3a4f3f; font-size: 14.5px; border-radius: 0 8px 8px 0; line-height: 1.9; letter-spacing: 0.3px; font-style: italic;
styles.img: max-width: 100%; height: auto; border-radius: 6px; margin: 22px auto; display: block; box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(30,42,33,0.08); border: 1px solid #dfe4d8;
styles.strong: color: #1e2a21; font-weight: 800; background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 62%, #d4deaa 62%, #d4deaa 95%, transparent 95%); padding: 0 2px;
styles.code_inline: background: #e8ede3; color: #3a4f3f; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 13px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Menlo', 'Consolas', 'SF Mono', monospace; border: 1px solid #d0d9ca;
styles.code_block: background: #1e2a21; color: #e8ede3; padding: 20px 22px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.7; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Menlo', 'Consolas', monospace; overflow-x: auto; white-space: pre-wrap; word-wrap: break-word; margin: 22px 0; border: 1px solid #2d3e32;
styles.ol: margin: 18px 0 18px 8px; padding-left: 28px; list-style-type: decimal; list-style-position: outside; color: #5c7a65; font-weight: 700;
styles.li: margin: 10px 0; line-height: 1.85; padding-left: 8px; color: #1e2a21; font-weight: 400; min-height: 22px;
styles.hr: border: none; height: 1px; background: linear-gradient(to right, transparent, #b8c5bb, transparent); margin: 36px 0;
styles.a: color: #3a4f3f; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(58,79,63,0.4); padding-bottom: 1px;
styles.table: width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin: 22px 0; font-size: 14px; border-radius: 6px; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid #dfe4d8;
styles.th: background: #1e2a21; color: #f7f5ee; padding: 12px 14px; text-align: left; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; letter-spacing: 0.3px;
styles.caption: font-size: 12.5px; color: #8a9580; text-align: center; margin-top: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.5px; font-style: italic;
styles.section_divider: text-align: center; color: #b8c5bb; letter-spacing: 14px; font-size: 12px; margin: 36px 0 30px; user-select: none;

highlights.hl_yellow: background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 55%, #eae2a8 55%); color: #1e2a21; padding: 0 3px; font-weight: 600;
